description: Use this API to change the value of a VAR of an auxiliary signal model of a specified two- terminal dc line. This API routine was first introduced in release 32.0.0. ierr = change_ttdcauxmod_var(dc, isgndx, model, j, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_ttdcauxmod_var(dc, isgndx, model, j, rdata)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the two-terminal dc line receiving the of the auxiliary signal model; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left- justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: isgndx
parameters.description: Auxiliary signal injection point number, or the auxiliary signal index. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Var number to change relative to the start of the block of vars assigned to this model (1 for var(j), 2 for var(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New var value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: invalid ISGNDX value for a two-terminal dc line.
no auxiliary signal model at this index for this two-terminal dc line.
model at this index for this two-terminal dc line is aaa not xxx.
VAR number outside of the VAR range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
